description_long: This coatrack features a rectangular wooden backplate with a rich, dark brown finish, giving it a classic and sturdy appearance. Five evenly spaced metal hooks protrude from the front, each with a slightly curved design for securely hanging coats, hats, or bags. The mounting plate is accented by two visible round fasteners at either end, suggesting robust wall attachment. The wood grain is visible, adding a natural texture and warmth to the overall look. The hooks are metallic and have a matte, slightly rough finish, contrasting with the smoother wood. There are no decorative carvings or embellishments, emphasizing a functional and minimalist design.
description: A rectangular wooden wall-mounted coatrack with five metal hooks and visible mounting fasteners, featuring a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the wooden backplate and the protrusion of the metal hooks.
description_view_1: Top view displaying the flat, rectangular wooden surface with no visible hooks or fasteners.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, highlighting the depth of the wood and the outward curve of the hooks.
description_view_3: Front view showing all five metal hooks, the wood grain, and two round mounting fasteners at the ends.
